## Checklist

- [ ] There is a related Issue (required for non-trivial changes)
- [ ] Large changes were discussed in that Issue before implementation
- [ ] The change is small and focused
- [ ] I added or ran tests (`node --test tests/*.test.mjs` and/or relevant manual checks)
- [ ] This PR does not include real task data, Webhook URLs, tokens, or other secrets
- [ ] I understand that review and merge are not guaranteed
